comments.author: @antoniobrazrivaltadebarros7693
comments.text: Lamentável esse documentário ignorar várias cidades litorâneas como Puerto Mont, Puerto Varas de onde se avista o Vulcão Osorno e de onde se navega para Cruces Del Lagos, Puerto Natales como entrada do Parque Nacional Torres Del Paine, a cidade banhada pelo Estreito de Magalhães denominada Punta Atenas

replies.author: @truehorizons66
replies.text: Chile has so many amazing places that it's impossible to cover them all in one documentary. Thank you for your insightful comments and wonderful suggestions.

comments.author: @Faancheyu
comments.text: I am originally from Hong Kong and now residing in Europe. This documentary has really opened my eyes of the southernmost part of South America. After watching this now I have two new aims, buy and learn how to fly a drone properly, the second one will be i have to visit this place myself one day.

replies.author: @truehorizons66
replies.text: Thank you so much for your wonderful comment! We're truly happy to hear the documentary inspired you. We hope you get to fly your own drone and experience the breathtaking landscapes of southern South America in person one day.

comments.author: @iramyrocha4555
comments.text: I`ve been in El Calafate (AR) and Torres del Paine (CL). Its incredible. Wonderful.

replies.author: @truehorizons66
replies.text: Wow, you’ve been to two incredible places. Patagonia has a beauty that feels almost unreal. Thanks for sharing your experience!

comments.author: @ckaper78
comments.text:
Why do i have an impression that this channel might not be an owner of the footage? 4k images mixed up with some low res clips and pictures? Already mentioned incorrect pronunciation... etc.
Patagonia is beautiful, though.

replies.author: @truehorizons66
replies.text: Thank you for your honest feedback. We will continue our efforts to improve the consistency of the footage, pronunciation, and overall accuracy. Patagonia is truly beautiful, and I am very grateful you watched it.

comments.text: The video provides so much insightful knowledge, from the history of the ancient Cueva de las Manos cave to the hunting behavior of orcas on the Valdés Peninsula 😃😃
